steps.title: Verify package label
steps.observableCriteria: The label and work order LOT A-104 are visible together and compared.
steps.riskNote: Small label text can be missed; keep the label close to camera.

steps.title: Read the QR code
steps.observableCriteria: The package QR is presented and package ID PKG-4821 is confirmed.
steps.riskNote: A brief QR presentation can fall between sampled frames.

steps.title: Inspect all package surfaces
steps.observableCriteria: The top and all four side surfaces are each brought into view for damage inspection.
steps.riskNote: Side views are commonly omitted or left outside the camera frame.

steps.title: Apply the security seal
steps.observableCriteria: A blue security seal is visibly applied across the center seam.
steps.riskNote: The final seal position must remain visible.

steps.title: Complete the inspection
steps.observableCriteria: The Complete control is pressed after the preceding evidence.
